title: Prove no exterior scalar tail for J_V_residue
description: Dangerous form: phi_JV = C_JV/r. Required condition: define J_V and prove C_JV = 0 or route it through a derived A-sector law. The sector must not leave a nonzero ordinary exterior 1/r scalar tail unless a future source-routing theorem explicitly routes it through the A-sector without double counting.
